scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: cd artifacts/muted-science && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm dev
scripts.dev:muted-science: cd artifacts/muted-science && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:muted-science: cd artifacts/muted-science && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm build
scripts.serve:muted-science: cd artifacts/muted-science && PORT=${PORT:-8080} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm serve
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
